subject: (no subject)
body:
There is a new a/c unit in PB - rich  needs to go balance it /check it etc. He would like to go this Sat and make a mini vacation out of it taking his wife and kid - he'd stay in guest house and return NY we - the work in PB will take 2 days. He is paying for his familys tix on plane and I sd I check if this is ok w/you and allow him to use car over w/e to see family in Boca..let me know




Thx

G
